name: hyperwave-wallet-tron
description: HyperWave Tron wallet: self-custodial WDK Tron (native TRX + TRC-20 USDT) implementations of the hyperwave-engine Wallet interface, runs under Bare.
author: Mokhtar Naamani <mokhtar.naamani@gmail.com>

scripts.lint:jsdoc: tsc --noEmit --allowJs --checkJs --strict --skipLibCheck --maxNodeModuleJsDepth 0 --target es2022 lib/tron-wallet.js lib/tron-usdt-wallet.js 2>&1 | grep -E 'error TS80' ; test $? -eq 1
